mapper.select:
SELECT ult.id, ult.user_id, ult.action_type, ult.target_id, ult.key_word, ult.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages FROM user_learning_trace ult LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = ult.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ult.action_type LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.actionType},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY ult.created_at DESC

SELECT ult.id, ult.user_id, ult.action_type, ult.target_id, ult.key_word, ult.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages FROM user_learning_trace ult LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = ult.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND ult.user_id = #{userId}
